name: ClusterCAD Search Domains
description: Search all 531 PKS clusters in ClusterCAD for modules containing domains matching specified criteria using a local cache for fast lookup. Common substrate names are automatically translated to ClusterCAD annotation terms.

inputs.name: domain_type
inputs.description: Primary domain type to search for (e.g. 'AT', 'KS', 'KR', 'DH', 'ER', 'ACP'). Case insensitive.

inputs.name: annotation_contains
inputs.description: Optional text to search for in domain annotations. Common names are auto-translated: malonylâ†’mal, methylmalonylâ†’mmal, ethylmalonylâ†’emal, butyryl/butylmalonylâ†’butmal, hexylmalonylâ†’hxmal, hydroxymalonylâ†’hmal, methoxymalonylâ†’mxmal, isobutyrylâ†’isobut, propionylâ†’prop, acetylâ†’Acetyl-CoA, pyruvateâ†’pyr. You can also search for 'loading', 'non-loading', 'active', 'inactive'.

inputs.name: domain_types
inputs.description: Optional list of domain types that must ALL be present in the module (e.g. ['KR', 'DH', 'ER'] finds modules with all three). Use this to find modules with specific domain combinations.

inputs.name: exclude_annotation
inputs.description: Optional text to exclude domains with this annotation (e.g. 'inactive' to exclude inactive domains).

inputs.name: active_only
inputs.description: If true, only return domains that are not annotated as inactive. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: loading_module_only
inputs.description: If true, only return results from loading modules (module 0). Defaults to false.

inputs.name: cluster_description_contains
inputs.description: Optional text to filter results by cluster name (e.g. 'erythromycin' to only search within erythromycin clusters).

inputs.name: min_modules
inputs.description: Only return clusters with at least this many total modules. Useful for finding complex PKS assemblies.

inputs.name: max_modules
inputs.description: Only return clusters with at most this many total modules. Useful for finding simpler PKS assemblies.

inputs.name: reviewed_only
inputs.description: If true, only search manually reviewed clusters. Defaults to false.

inputs.name: max_results
inputs.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

inputs.name: force_refresh
inputs.description: If true, re-downloads all cluster data and rebuilds the cache. Use if the database has been updated. Defaults to false.

outputs.description: List of matching results, each with 'accession', 'description', 'subunit_name', 'subunit_id', 'module', 'total_modules', 'product_smiles', 'all_domains', and 'matching_domains'.
